overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Buffer ETF - March (QMAR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holding period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. QMAR was launched on Mar 19, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.
